description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a combination of dark and light exterior finishes. The front facade is highlighted by large rectangular windows and a central entryway adorned with greenery and planters. The rear side includes a wide patio or terrace area, covered by an overhanging roof and lined with glass doors and windows, suggesting an open connection to the outdoors. The structure is composed of multiple interlocking rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass. The overall look is sleek and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on clean lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, layered rectangular volumes, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The design features a prominent entryway with greenery and a spacious rear terrace.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway, large windows, and decorative greenery, with a balanced mix of dark and light surfaces.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the boxy structure, flat roof sections, and a row of windows along the upper floor.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights a wide terrace or patio, extensive glass doors and windows, and the overhanging roof.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the layered volumes and the continuation of the flat roof, with fewer windows visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a flat overhang, large glass door, flanked by planters and greenery, minimalistic and open
